title: lappago latipes
intro: Lappago latipes, also known as Lappago, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Lappago latipes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
